arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CloudFront real-time log configuration.

endpoint.description: The endpoint settings for the real-time log configuration, typically involving Kinesis stream details.

fields.description: The fields included in the real-time log configuration.

id.description: The identifier for the CloudFront real-time log configuration.

sampling_rate.description: The percentage of requests that are sampled for real-time logging.
